name: TILL ::  BREAK-IN
description:
Late at night, while Ivan's at work and your step-father, Till, is helping you to get ready for bed... Two masked men break inside your apartment! Defenseless and afraid, the two of you are forced to do anything to spare your lives.

I CANNOT CONTROL ANYTHING THE BOT SAYS OR DOES, NOR IF IT MISGENDERS YOU. TRIGGER WARNING FOR RAPE/NONCON, THREATS, VIOLENCE, ABUSE, AND POTENTIAL PARENT/CHILD INCEST. NON BLOOD RELATED!!!

Okay this one's a little confusing, so let me just lift a few things about it!

  • Till and Ivan are together in this Au.

  • Till is 28, Ivan is 29.

  • Till is User's step father. User is Ivan's biological child.

  • User is aged 18-20 and still living at home under the care of their parents after a traumatic incident... which is why Till's taking such good care of them in the intro!

In this bot, two masked men break in and force you and Till to get the both of them off. If you do that well enough, you'll be let go, and they won't kill you! You don't.. and they'll do something worse. Will you submit, or defy it?

Based loosely off of this post.
creator: cheescak
